summary: Add schema-aware report recipes/detection, seller-no-DSP persona view, profitability-first docs, SP weekly review planning, seller-store validation, and privacy-safe feedback metadata.
reason: Field feedback showed profitability-focused sellers needed report-kind guidance, less DSP clutter, clearer organic + advertising TACOS discovery, mutation-safe weekly triage, and structured local feedback for reprint loops.
validated_outcome: gofmt passes; go test ./internal/adsanalytics ./internal/cli and go test ./... pass for library/commerce/amazon-ads; python3 .github/scripts/verify-skill/verify_skill.py --dir library/commerce/amazon-ads passes; GO111MODULE=off go run tools/generate-skills/main.go completed, and generated cli-skills mirror diffs were restored per repo policy.
